steps.title: Find the text's key purpose
steps.content:
The passage describes two institutions and explicitly identifies each one's area of focus.

MOLAA focuses on “modern and contemporary art by Latin American artists and Latino artists in the United States,” while NHCC focuses on “the literature, art, and cultures of Latin America as well as of Latino communities in the United States.”

steps.title: Match the purpose to the choices
steps.content:
C directly matches: it states the text presents information about two institutions and their areas of focus.

A, B, and D each describe elements absent from the passage:
  • A mentions funding (not discussed)
  • B claims a collection-size comparison (only one institution's size appears)
  • D suggests historical causation (only founding dates are provided)
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
